title: Upload a valid Wide Text CSV and proceed to preview
description: Verifies a user can upload a valid CSV, see a successful load state with file name, and navigate to the data preview page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid CSV file using the upload control
Click the control to proceed to the data preview
Verify the user lands on the data preview page

title: Reject malformed or non-CSV upload and remain on upload page
description: Verifies the app shows a parse failure state for an invalid file and does not proceed to preview.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a non-CSV or malformed file using the upload control
Verify a parse error message is visible
Verify the user remains on the upload page

title: Download sample CSV format from upload page
description: Verifies the sample format download can be initiated from the upload page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to download the sample format
Verify a download is initiated

title: Preview shows parsed dataset summary after successful upload
description: Verifies the preview page displays a non-empty summary for brands, CEPs, and respondents after uploading data.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid CSV file using the upload control
Click the control to proceed to the data preview
Verify summary of brands, CEPs, and respondent count is displayed

title: Confirm data on preview and navigate to executive summary
description: Verifies confirming the previewed data routes the user into the Executive Summary analysis page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid CSV file using the upload control
Click the control to proceed to the data preview
Submit the confirm action to proceed to analysis
Verify the user lands on the executive summary page

title: Reset/discard data from preview and return to upload
description: Verifies a user can discard loaded data from preview and is returned to the upload page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid CSV file using the upload control
Click the control to proceed to the data preview
Click the cancel or reset action to discard data
Verify the user lands on the upload page

title: Preview page without loaded data shows empty state and can navigate to upload
description: Verifies the preview page indicates no data is loaded and provides a way back to upload.

steps.description: Navigate to /preview
Click the action that navigates to upload data
Verify the user lands on the upload page

title: Executive summary loads KPIs and brand table after confirming data
description: Verifies the executive summary displays core KPI cards and a non-empty sortable brand performance table after data is confirmed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid CSV file using the upload control
Click the control to proceed to the data preview
Submit the confirm action to proceed to analysis
Verify KPI cards for key totals and averages are displayed
Verify the brand performance table is displayed

title: Sort brand performance table by a metric column
description: Verifies a user can change the sort order of the brand table via a column sort control.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid CSV file using the upload control
Click the control to proceed to the data preview
Submit the confirm action to proceed to analysis
Click a table column header to change the sort order
Verify the table row order updates to reflect the selected sort

title: Export brand metrics as CSV from executive summary
description: Verifies the executive summary export action initiates a CSV download for brand metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid CSV file using the upload control
Click the control to proceed to the data preview
Submit the confirm action to proceed to analysis
Click the export action to export brand metrics as CSV
Verify a CSV download is initiated

title: Brand Analysis loads and allows selecting a brand to view metrics and chart
description: Verifies a user can select a brand and see populated metric cards and an MPen comparison chart for that brand.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid Wide Text survey CSV file using the upload control
Wait for the data preview to finish loading
Confirm the data preview to proceed to analysis
Click the navigation option to open the brand analysis page
Select a brand from the dropdown
Verify the metric cards for the selected brand are displayed with numeric values
Verify a bar chart comparing mental penetration across brands is displayed with the selected brand highlighted

title: Brand Analysis shows MMS position label after brand selection
description: Verifies that selecting a brand displays an MMS position classification label (Strong/Stable/Vulnerable).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid Wide Text survey CSV file using the upload control
Wait for the data preview to finish loading
Confirm the data preview to proceed to analysis
Click the navigation option to open the brand analysis page
Select a brand from the dropdown
Verify an MMS position label is displayed for the selected brand
Verify the mental market share value is shown in the metric cards

title: Brand Analysis changes displayed metrics when switching brands
description: Verifies that switching the selected brand updates the displayed brand-specific metrics.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid Wide Text survey CSV file using the upload control
Wait for the data preview to finish loading
Confirm the data preview to proceed to analysis
Click the navigation option to open the brand analysis page
Select a brand from the dropdown
Select a different brand from the dropdown
Verify the selected brand’s metric cards update to new numeric values
Verify the bar chart highlight updates to match the newly selected brand

title: Brand Analysis supports info icon hover for metric definitions
description: Verifies that hovering metric info icons reveals a definition/tooltip for the metric.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid Wide Text survey CSV file using the upload control
Wait for the data preview to finish loading
Confirm the data preview to proceed to analysis
Click the navigation option to open the brand analysis page
Select a brand from the dropdown
Hover over an info icon associated with a metric card
Verify a metric definition tooltip or help text becomes visible

title: Brand Analysis empty state appears when no parsed data exists and user can go upload
description: Verifies that navigating to Brand Analysis with no loaded data shows an upload prompt and allows navigating to the upload page.

steps.description: Navigate to /brand-analysis
Verify an empty state prompting the user to upload data is displayed
Click the call to action to go to the data upload page
Verify the user lands on the data import page with the CSV upload control available

title: CEP Grid loads and displays summary widgets and heatmap after data load
description: Verifies a user can load CSV data, open the CEP Grid page, and see summary widgets and the heatmap grid.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid Wide Text survey CSV file using the upload control
Wait for the data preview to finish loading
Confirm the data preview to proceed to analysis
Click the navigation option to open the CEP grid page
Verify summary widgets for CEP grid are displayed with numeric values
Verify a color-coded brand-by-CEP grid is displayed

title: CEP Grid supports horizontal scrolling to inspect all CEP columns
description: Verifies the CEP Grid can be horizontally scrolled to reveal additional CEP columns.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid Wide Text survey CSV file using the upload control
Wait for the data preview to finish loading
Confirm the data preview to proceed to analysis
Click the navigation option to open the CEP grid page
Scroll horizontally within the grid area to reveal additional CEP columns
Verify additional CEP columns become visible in the grid

title: CEP Grid shows percentage values inside cells for brand-CEP associations
description: Verifies that the heatmap cells show percentage values representing association strength.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid Wide Text survey CSV file using the upload control
Wait for the data preview to finish loading
Confirm the data preview to proceed to analysis
Click the navigation option to open the CEP grid page
Verify at least one grid cell displays a percentage value for association strength

title: CEP Grid export action is available and initiates CSV export
description: Verifies that the export control is available and triggers a CSV export action from the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid Wide Text survey CSV file using the upload control
Wait for the data preview to finish loading
Confirm the data preview to proceed to analysis
Click the navigation option to open the CEP grid page
Click the export control to export the grid as CSV
Verify the UI indicates the export action was initiated or completed

title: CEP Grid empty state appears when no parsed data exists and user can go upload
description: Verifies that navigating to CEP Grid with no loaded data shows an upload prompt and allows navigating to the upload page.

steps.description: Navigate to /cep-grid
Verify an empty state prompting the user to upload data is displayed
Click the call to action to go to the data upload page
Verify the user lands on the data import page with the CSV upload control available
